title: Doğuş University Men’s Basketball Team in the first League
content:
Student

News

Details

Doğuş University Men’s Basketball Team in the first League

Doğuş University, which has built a reputation for its achievements in many branches of sports, makes a name for itself in basketball, too.  Our university defeated many of its opponents and come in second in the final match of the second league in basketball tournament among 22 universities. Our team lost the final match against Boğaziçi University during the additional time and come in second and took their place in the first league. We congratulate our students and wish them success for future.
